scripts.compile: npx solcjs --abi --bin contracts-合约/AgentVault.sol --output-dir artifacts-编译产物
scripts.deploy: npx tsx scripts-脚本/deploy-ethers-部署合约.ts
scripts.demo: npx tsx demo-演示/run-all-scenarios-运行全部场景.ts
scripts.scenario1: npx tsx demo-演示/scenario1-success-场景1成功支付.ts
scripts.scenario2: npx tsx demo-演示/scenario2-rejected-场景2拒绝支付.ts
scripts.scenario3: npx tsx demo-演示/scenario3-audit-场景3审计日志.ts
scripts.bot: npx tsx bot-机器人/telegram-approval-审批通知.ts
scripts.x402-server: npx tsx x402-机器支付/x402-server-服务端.ts
scripts.x402-demo: npx tsx x402-机器支付/demo-x402-演示.ts
scripts.dashboard: cd frontend-前端 && npm run dev
